name: Salt minimal medium (MM) with ibuprofen (IBU) as sole carbon source (PMC11892951)
description: Salt minimal medium (MM) with ibuprofen (IBU) as sole carbon source — medium reported in PMC11892951 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC11892951 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.formulation_warning: workflow correction sparse; kept original — This is a real defined growth medium (a minimal salt medium with ibuprofen as the sole carbon source), so it is NOT rejected. The current formulation is incomplete/wrong: it lists only O2 as a component and puts ibuprofen (the actual sole carbon source, 1 g/L) into 'uncovered' rather than as a component. CRITICAL LIMITATION: this paper does NOT provide the mineral-salt composition of the 'salt minimal medium (MM)'. It cites the composition to reference 43 (Hernáez MJ, Reineke W, Santero E. 'Genetic analysis of biodegradation of tetralin by a Sphingomonas strain', Appl Environ Microbiol 1999;65:1806-10, doi:10.1128/AEM.65.4.1806-1810.1999). The base salts, phosphate buffer, N source and trace elements therefore could NOT be verified or expanded from THIS source and are deliberately not fabricated here. To complete the formulation, retrieve the MM salt composition from ref 43 (Santero-lab minimal salts medium). Confidence marked low precisely because the salt base is unverifiable from the paper in hand. Aerobic is well supported ('in aeration at 30°C', pre-inoculum at '180 rpm'). Grown by ibuprofen-degrading bacterial consortia (Achromobacter, Brucella/Ochrobactrum, etc.) enriched from wastewater; a rich non-selective medium 'MML' (also from ref 43) is mentioned separately and is a different medium.
provenance.verification_evidence: Cultures in salt minimal medium (MM) [43] with IBU 1 g/L as carbon source were diluted one-fourth of the previous 20 ml saturated culture in aeration at 30°C for ~15 days ... Commercial IBU sodium salt was purchased from Sigma-Aldrich.

uncovered.name: ibuprofen (sodium salt)
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

oxygen_note: no oxygen requirement specified; O2 available but not asserted
